title: February 16, 2015 – Jamie Coon
summary: Jamie Coon is our guest this week. From Okemah, Oklahoma, Jamie Coon is a soul pop singer of Creek and Seminole heritage. Influenced by artists such as Ronnie Milsap and Elton John, Jamie sings with soul and passion. Her music has been placed in television and films such as the documentary ‘I am Nan...
